sections.paragraph:
Jesaiah 1. Called Jeshaiah, grandson of Zerubbabel
1Ch 3:21
2. Son of Jeduthun
1Ch 25:3; 1Ch 25:15
3. Grandson of Eliezer
1Ch 26:25
4. A Jew of the family of Elam, who returned from Exile
Ezr 8:7
5. A Levite who joined Ezra to return to Jerusalem
Ezr 8:19
6. A Benjamite, detailed by lot to dwell in Jerusalem after the exile
Neh 11:7
